title: ligusticum aromaticum
intro: Ligusticum aromaticum, also known as Chinese Lovage or Garden Lovage, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ligusticum aromaticum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Ligusticum aromaticum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root for use in herbal medicine.
